TestCase1.TestDescription: Verify Info message displayed when Button Panel device is reachable
TestCase1.Precondition: Set the Physical Ebus ID to 14 as a precondition to pass the test case
TestCase1.TestCaseHeader: Verify Info message displayed when Button Panel device is reachable

VerifyMessage.MessageText: EBP 110EU/MK - Hardware found : Device is reachable at the 3.

TestCase2.TestDescription: Verify Info message displayed when live Button panel device matches described device in destiny file
TestCase2.Precondition: Set the Physical Ebus ID to 14 as a precondition to pass the test case
TestCase2.TestCaseHeader: Verify Info message displayed when live Button panel device matches described device in destiny file

VerifyMessage.MessageText: EBP 110EU/MK - Hardware Match : The specified device match with the live device at the 3.

TestCase3.TestDescription: Verify error message displayed when Button Panel device is not compatible
TestCase3.Precondition: Set the Physical Ebus ID to 14 as a precondition to pass the test case
TestCase3.TestCaseHeader: Verify error message displayed when Button Panel device is not compatible

VerifyMessage.MessageText: EBP 110EU/MK - Hardware Incompatible : The specified device is not compatible with the live device at the 18.

TestCase4.TestDescription: Verify error message displayed when Button Panel device is not reachable
TestCase4.Precondition: Set the Physical Ebus ID to 14 as a precondition to pass the test case
TestCase4.TestCaseHeader: Verify error message displayed when Button Panel device is not reachable

VerifyMessage.MessageText: EBP 110EU/MK - Hardware not found : The device at the 5 is not found. Please check the device connection and retry.

TestCase5.TestDescription: Verify Warning message displayed when Button Panel device is not matching
TestCase5.Precondition: Set the Physical Ebus ID to 3 as a precondition to pass the test case
TestCase5.TestCaseHeader: Verify Warning message displayed when Button Panel device is not matching

VerifyMessage.MessageText: EBP 110EU/MK - Hardware mismatch : The specified device does not match live device at the 3.
